metadata.name: Suspect — Frantic Scapegoat ETB trigger makes it suspected
metadata.description: Tests the Suspect keyword action (CR 701.60) triggered by Frantic Scapegoat's ETB ability. P1 casts Frantic Scapegoat ({R}, 1/1 Goat with Haste). When it enters the battlefield its triggered ability fires: 'suspect it'. After the trigger resolves, Frantic Scapegoat becomes suspected — gaining Menace and 'This creature can't block' for as long as it stays suspected (CR 701.60c). The script asserts: (1) initial hand state, (2) the creature on the stack after cast, (3) the creature on the battlefield with is_suspected: true after the ETB trigger resolves, and (4) final state with stack empty and the suspected designation persisting.
metadata.generation_notes: Frantic Scapegoat card definition at crates/engine/src/cards/defs/frantic_scapegoat.rs. Oracle text: Haste; WhenEntersBattlefield trigger: 'When this creature enters, suspect it' (Effect::Suspect { target: EffectTarget::Source }). CR 701.60a: creature becomes suspected until it leaves the battlefield or an effect ends the designation. CR 701.60b: Suspected is a designation (not an ability or copiable value). CR 701.60c: suspected creature gains Menace and 'This creature can't block' while suspected. CR 701.60d: a suspected creature can't become suspected again (not exercised here). The ETB trigger goes on the stack as a separate triggered ability after the creature resolves (standard trigger queuing — NOT inline). Priority flow: cast_spell -> priority_round -> stack_resolve (creature enters) -> trigger on stack -> priority_round -> stack_resolve (suspect trigger) -> assert is_suspected.

script.step_note: p1 casts Frantic Scapegoat; after it resolves onto the battlefield its ETB trigger fires, suspecting it; once the trigger resolves Frantic Scapegoat has is_suspected: true (gains Menace and can't block per CR 701.60c)

actions.description: Initial: Frantic Scapegoat in p1 hand, battlefield empty, stack empty
actions.note: Frantic Scapegoat is in p1's hand. Nothing on the battlefield yet.
CR 601.2: p1 casts Frantic Scapegoat paying {R} from the mana pool. Card moves from hand to the stack.

actions.description: After casting: Frantic Scapegoat on stack, p1 hand empty
actions.note: Frantic Scapegoat spell is on the stack awaiting priority passes.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — Frantic Scapegoat spell resolves.

resolution.note: CR 608.2: Frantic Scapegoat resolves and enters the battlefield as a 1/1 Goat with Haste. Its ETB triggered ability ('When this creature enters, suspect it') is queued.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Frantic Scapegoat enters the battlefield. Its WhenEntersBattlefield trigger is placed on the stack.

actions.description: Final: Frantic Scapegoat on battlefield with is_suspected: true, stack empty (ETB fires inline)
actions.note: CR 701.60a-c: The WhenEntersBattlefield ETB trigger fires inline during creature resolution (same as Discover). Effect::Suspect sets is_suspected on the creature immediately. Stack is empty after creature resolves. The suspected designation gives Menace and 'can't block' for as long as the designation persists.
